name: Henager City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Henager City Park in Henagar, AL! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Topspin Pickleball Club
description: Topspin Pickleball Club is a Selkirk-sponsored facility located in Rainsville, AL dedicated to providing a premier indoor pickleball experience for players of all ages and skill levels. This facility features state-of-the-art courts, professional instruction, and a welcoming community atmosphere.
open_play_schedule: All events and court reservations can be viewed on Court Reserve: https://app.courtreserve.com/Online/Portal/Index/12227
fees: Fee required — Memberships are optional, and drop-ins are welcome.
